name: 51_Devin_AI_Software_Engineer_Plants_Secret_Messages_in_Images
query: Hi! Please follow the instructions from the blog post [Hidden in Plain Sight](https://www.factsmachine.ai/p/hidden-in-plain-sight) to set up the script mentioned for generating images with hidden text in `src/visualize.py`. Ensure the generated images are of 1080p resolution and saved in `results/figures/`. Create control images embedding the text "FUTURE" and save it in `results/figures/`. Please also manually verify that the hidden text is indeed embedded in the generated images.

requirements.criteria: The instructions from the blog post [Hidden in Plain Sight](https://www.factsmachine.ai/p/hidden-in-plain-sight) are followed to set up the script mentioned for generating images with hidden text in `src/visualize.py`.
The generated images are ensured to be of "1080p" resolution and saved in `results/figures/`.
Control images embedding the text "FUTURE," is created and saved in `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: The system should be capable of learning and using unfamiliar technologies, adapting to new tools or platforms as required.
After reviewing the blog post, ControlNet should be successfully run on Modal to produce the images with the concealed messages for user.

judge_stats.criteria: The instructions from the blog post [Hidden in Plain Sight](https://www.factsmachine.ai/p/hidden-in-plain-sight) are followed to set up the script mentioned for generating images with hidden text in `src/visualize.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement is to follow the instructions from the blog post to set up the script for generating images with hidden text in `src/visualize.py`. However, the provided content of `visualize.py` does not contain any implementation related to generating images with hidden text. It only includes a minimal semantic implementation with a function `requirement_notes()` that returns a string of requirement criteria and a `main()` function that returns a status dictionary. Additionally, the trajectory evidence indicates issues during execution: a missing library for text encoding and an error due to insufficient permissions for saving images. These issues suggest that the script is not fully set up as per the blog post instructions, and the functionality for generating images with hidden text is not operational.

judge_stats.criteria: The generated images are ensured to be of "1080p" resolution and saved in `results/figures/`.

reason: <SATISFIED>: The requirement that the generated images are of "1080p" resolution and saved in `results/figures/` is met. The project structure confirms the existence of the `results/figures` directory. The trajectory evidence from Step 45 indicates that images were successfully generated and saved in this directory without errors. Furthermore, Step 47 verifies that the images meet the "1080p" resolution requirement, with no discrepancies noted. This confirms that the images were correctly generated and stored as specified.

judge_stats.criteria: Control images embedding the text "FUTURE," is created and saved in `results/figures/`.

reason: <SATISFIED>: The requirement for creating and saving control images embedding the text "FUTURE" in the `results/figures/` directory is met. The project structure confirms the existence of the `results/figures` directory. Additionally, the trajectory evidence from Step 45 and Step 47 indicates that the images were successfully created, saved, and verified without any errors or issues, confirming that the images were correctly embedded with the text "FUTURE" and saved as intended.
